name: forge
description: VS Code/Cursor extension (Forge Studio) for context engineering: `.forge` product and technical intent, staged agent workflow, and GitHub as the system of record for issues and roadmap. Includes a planned Forge Roadmap command: read-only webview of Projects v2 issues whose Status is not Done, grouped by Sprint field or by milestone, pass-through GitHub auth with sign-in prompt when needed, scoped per active project with multi-root disambiguation—without storing a duplicate backlog in the repo.
